title: Heights and Caves
description: A Deeper Overworld and 4 New Dimensions
body:
# The End
The End Now around 10 Biomes has been overhauled to use some new blocks via the resource pack and some vanilla blocks
# The Islands
Think the End is late game jump off the main end island safely and reach the islands which sit above the overworld and cotain wood and all the other resources you need
# The Overworld
Is larger reaching a deep Y-2032 it spans layers of Stone, Deepslate, Redstone, Yellowstone, Lava, Blackstone, Netherrack, Magma and Obsidian.
# The Nether
Not Updated
# The Frozen Peaks
A Dimension that despite being called peaks is completely underground 
# The Sculk Dimension
Break through the bottom of the frozen peaks and reach the home of the warden which contains enough sculk to make your xp bar fill to the top
# The Toxic Dimension
This is the only dimension where mobs cant live but can you
# The Willow
A Set of islands at the very bottom of the world nobody knows whats below it

[This Resource pack is needed for 26.1 and 1.21.11](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/heights-and-caves-resource-pack)

Sharing Videos and Screenshots of this pack is 100% fine
This pack works with Terralith if this pack is put above

5-8GB RAM is recommened to be allocated to Minecraft to run this pack

V1.4 and V1.2 are now supported by Fabric and Forge
